zh.lifeSummary: 當William Ogle of Choppington於1412年出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德奧格爾 卡素時，他的父親Robert Ogle33歲，母親Margaret Grey31歲。他和Margaret Musgrave至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1474年8月28日在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德享年62歲。

nameMeanings.name: Ogle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Northumberland and Durham): from Ogle in Whalton, Northumberland. The placename might derive from the Old English personal name Ocga + Old English hyll ‘hill’. This surname has been established in Ireland since the mid 17th century.

variants.name: Ogles
meanings: English (southeastern): variant of Ogle , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.

variants.name: O
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

nameMeanings.name: Choppington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name, possibly an irregular development of the name of Chevington (Suffolk), as the first bearer and the modern distribution suggest, but other evidence suggests that it is really from Choppington in Bedlington (Northumb), which was Chepynton, 1358 in Close Rolls .

variants.name: Close Rolls
meanings: English: (i) occupational name from Middle English curtiler ‘gardener’ (Old French cortiller, courtillier, cultilier). (ii) occupational name from an agent derivative of Middle English kirtel, curtil ‘tunic, (outer) garment’, denoting a maker of tunics and short skirts. Compare Alicia Curtle, 1231 in Close Rolls (Devon).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Ogle of Choppington was born in 1412, in Ogle Castle, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert Ogle, was 33 and his mother, Margaret Grey, was 31. He had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Margaret Musgrave. He died on 28 August 1474, in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Ogle of Choppington est né en 1412, à Ogle Castle, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Ogle, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Margaret Grey, avait 31 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Margaret Musgrave. Il est décédé le 28 août 1474, à Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 62 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: William Ogle of Choppington(이)가 1412년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 오글 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Ogle(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Grey(은)는 31세였다. 그는 Margaret Musgrave(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1474년 8월 28일 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.
